sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52042" key="kairospa/qhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καιρο-σπάθητος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">καῖρος</etym>) <sense id="n52042.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">close-woven</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὕφασμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
